pr.title: GolfStudent v2 14L: d=352, Value Residuals, GPTQ-lite, Schedule-Free, Muon+EMA

output.summary: Hybrid 14-layer model ups d to 352, mixes gated MLP recurrence with attention, adds value residual skip gates, GPTQ-lite INT8, and a schedule-free finish.
techniques: Hybrid gated-MLP plus attention stack with RoPE and learned value residual skips
Per-row GPTQ-lite INT8 quantization with zlib compression
Muon optimizer with fast EMA and constant LR floor in final phase
